cases.input: Generate a High-Level Design document for our Azure microservices platform. We have an API Gateway, 5 microservices, Cosmos DB, Service Bus, and App Insights. The audience is our technical leadership team.
cases.context: Architecture decisions already made, C4 diagrams needed, WAF validation section required, output as Markdown

cases.input: Create a Low-Level Design document for our Order Management Service. Include component specifications, API contracts (REST endpoints), data models, and sequence diagrams for the order creation flow.
cases.context: ASP.NET Core Minimal API, EF Core with Azure SQL, already designed in azure-architect and dotnet-architect handoffs

cases.input: Generate a tech-design-first specification (design.md) for a new feature: real-time inventory reservation during checkout. This touches the inventory service, payment service, and order service.
cases.context: Microservices architecture, distributed transactions, eventual consistency required, 99.9% availability target

cases.input: Create C4 context and container diagrams for our identity platform. The system handles Entra ID integration, B2B guest access, and Managed Identity for workloads across 3 Azure subscriptions.
cases.context: Mermaid format required, follows C4 model conventions, identity architect handoff available

cases.input: Generate a live architecture diagram from our resource group 'rg-prod-api'. Show all Azure resources and their connections including networking, compute, and data services.
cases.context: Existing Azure deployment, Reader access to resource group, az CLI available, output as Mermaid and SVG
